name: homura
description: Real Ruby + Sinatra on Cloudflare Workers via Opal

scripts.build:erb: bundle exec homura erb:compile --input views --output build/homura_templates.rb --namespace HomuraTemplates
scripts.build:assets: ruby "$(ruby bin/gem-path homura-runtime exe/compile-assets)" --input public --output build/homura_assets.rb --namespace HomuraAssets
scripts.build: ruby bin/generate-docs-search-index && bundle exec homura build
scripts.dev:dlq: npm run build && wrangler dev --env dlq-demo --port 8787 --ip 127.0.0.1
scripts.build:test: bundle exec homura erb:compile --input views --output build/homura_templates.rb --namespace HomuraTemplates && ruby bin/opal-test-build test/smoke.rb build/smoke-test.mjs -r opal_patches -r homura/runtime -r homura_templates
scripts.test: npm run build:test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/smoke-test.mjs && npm run test:http && npm run test:crypto && npm run test:jwt && npm run test:scheduled && npm run test:ai && npm run test:faraday && npm run test:multipart && npm run test:streaming && npm run test:octokit && npm run test:do && npm run test:cache && npm run test:queue && npm run test:sequel && npm run test:fiber-await && npm run test:classic-sinatra && npm run test:auto-await && npm run test:build-support && npm run test:compile-assets && npm run test:compile-erb && npm run test:homura-cli && npm run test:jwt-auth
scripts.test:classic-sinatra: npm run build:classic-sinatra-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/classic-sinatra-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:fiber-await: npm run build:fiber-await-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/fiber-await-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:sequel: npm run build:sequel-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/sequel-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:http: npm run build:http-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/http-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:crypto: npm run build:crypto-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/crypto-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:jwt: npm run build:jwt-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/jwt-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:ai: npm run build:ai-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/ai-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:scheduled: npm run build:scheduled-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/scheduled-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:faraday: npm run build:faraday-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/faraday-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:multipart: npm run build:multipart-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/multipart-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:streaming: npm run build:streaming-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/streaming-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:octokit: npm run build:octokit-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/octokit-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:do: npm run build:do-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/do-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:cache: npm run build:cache-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/cache-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:queue: npm run build:queue-test && ruby bin/node-with-runtime-setup build/queue-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:auto-await: bundle exec ruby test/auto_await_analyzer_smoke.rb && bundle exec ruby test/auto_await_cli_test.rb
scripts.clean: rm -f build/hello.no-exit.mjs build/smoke-test.mjs build/http-smoke.mjs build/crypto-smoke.mjs build/jwt-smoke.mjs build/ai-smoke.mjs build/scheduled-smoke.mjs build/faraday-smoke.mjs build/multipart-smoke.mjs build/streaming-smoke.mjs build/octokit-smoke.mjs build/do-smoke.mjs build/cache-smoke.mjs build/queue-smoke.mjs build/sequel-smoke.mjs build/homura_templates.rb build/homura_assets.rb build/opal.stderr.log
